meta_title: For Students: analytics setup to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to analytics setup and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Analytics Setup to Solve Slow Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Stop guessing why your app is slow. Learn how to implement professional analytics with Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your development workflow.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from blind spots in user behavior and performance bottlenecks. By integrating automated analytics, you gain actionable data to prioritize features that matter. Use Antigravity to instrument telemetry and Claude Code to automate the implementation, transforming your development from guesswork into a data-driven engineering process.
content.intro:
You are staring at a screen of code, three hours into a feature that nobody might actually use. This is the silent killer of student projects: the 'build-in-the-dark' trap. You feel like you are moving fast, but you are actually running in circles, wasting precious time on UI tweaks while your core logic remains unoptimized and unmeasured.

But what if you could see exactly where your users drop off? By embedding high-fidelity analytics into your stack, you shift from a student tinkering with code to an engineer solving real problems. We will use Antigravity and Claude Code to automate this instrumentation, giving you the visibility required to skyrocket your productivity and ship features that users actually demand.

steps.title: Define Your North Star Metrics
steps.description: Before writing code, identify the three key user actions that define success in your app. This prevents data bloat.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project structure and suggest a schema for tracking 3 key user conversion events based on my current routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'identify key user conversion events and suggest a lightweight schema'

steps.title: Automate Telemetry Injection
steps.description: Use automated tools to wrap your API calls with telemetry without manually touching every single route.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a middleware wrapper that intercepts all API requests and logs performance metrics to my analytics provider.

steps.title: Implement Error Tracking Hooks
steps.description: Capture runtime exceptions before they reach the user. This reduces debugging time by 50% by pinpointing the stack trace instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate an error-boundary component that reports stack traces and user context to my monitoring dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement global error boundary with automated reporting'

steps.title: Configure Performance Thresholds
steps.description: Set up automated alerts for latency spikes to ensure your app performance doesn't degrade as you scale your features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a monitoring configuration that triggers an alert if API response time exceeds 300ms.

steps.title: Validate Data Flow
steps.description: Run a simulation to ensure your analytics events are firing correctly before deploying to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test script that simulates a user flow and verifies that all defined analytics events are captured in the mock dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'validate analytics event capture across all routes'

pro_tips: Never track 'everything'. Focus on events that lead to user retention, not vanity metrics like page views.
Use sampling for high-traffic apps to keep your analytics costs low while maintaining statistical significance.
Anonymize all user data at the source to ensure your project is privacy-compliant from day one.
Set up a 'dev-only' analytics environment so your testing data doesn't pollute your production insights.
Automate your analytics dashboard creation; if you can't view the data in one click, you won't use it.
content.next_steps: Once your analytics are live, spend 24 hours observing real user behavior. Use the data to refactor your slowest route and delete any feature that has zero interaction.
content.conversion_block: Stop guessing and start building software that wins. By mastering analytics, you bridge the gap between a student project and a professional-grade SaaS. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
